title: The Air Force Has Been HIDING UFO Secrets
summary: This interview discusses the Air Force's silence regarding UFO secrets and their alleged history of disinformation campaigns against UFO researchers. The conversation focuses particularly on Richard Doty's involvement in spreading disinformation to ufologists like Paul Bennewitz, allegedly driving him to mental instability.

key_claims.claim: The Air Force has been notably silent about UFO-related matters, possibly because they have the most reputational damage to lose
Richard Doty was Air Force and would feed disinformation to ufologists who were making breakthroughs
Paul Bennewitz observed advanced aircraft being tested and Richard Doty subsequently manipulated him into believing he was communicating with aliens
Paul Bennewitz withdrew from the UFO community and some people attribute his suicide to Richard Doty's psychological manipulation
